interactive.rationale: 9 interactive controls wired to script logic — well past the static-card threshold.

references.rationale: The see-also section links to the CSS UI spec and https://chromestatus.com/feature/5082469066604544.

design_system.rationale: Raw hex colour tokens were replaced with public/styles.css variables and local semantic classes.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept's lede mirrors the feature index promise — same nouns, same scope.

spec_match.rationale: The demo now uses the real auto/manual caret-animation values instead of invalid blink/none shortcuts.

edge_cases.rationale: The comparison panel and support readout show invalid blink/none keywords being rejected.

summary: Verified with chrome-devtools-mcp 1.1.1 on Chrome Canary: clicked INSERT, VISUAL, SEARCH, and NORMAL; each mode computed caret-animation manual, with insert/search keyframes active and normal/visual steady. The invalid keyword branch reports CSS.supports('caret-animation: blink') false. Console/network were clean.
